name: Freedom Foods Group Limited
summary: Freedom Foods Group Limited engages in sourcing, manufacture, selling, marketing, and distribution of plant-based beverages, and dairy and nutritional ingredient products to wholesale and consumer markets. It operates through Dairy and Nutritional, Plant Based Beverages, Cereal and Snacks, and Specialty Seafood segments. The company offers gluten free, allergen free, nutritional oat based, low sugar or salt, fortified, or functional products, including breakfast cereals, snack bars, and other related products. It also provides dairy milk beverage and nutritional ingredient products; UHT food and beverage products, such as liquid stocks, soy, rice, and almond beverages; performance and adult nutritional products comprising powders, bars, and drinks, as well as on the go beverages; and canned seafood products that include sardines, salmon, and specialty seafood. In addition, the company offers popping corn, yellow maize and derivatives, white maize and derivatives, rice flour, sorghum flour, and specialty gluten-free flours; and invests in dairy farming operations. It provides its products under the Messy Monkeys, Heritage Mill, Brekky Heroes, Freedom Foods, Barley+, Arnold's Farm, Crankt Protein, Australia's Own, MILKLAB, Simply White, So Natural, Almond Breeze, Australia's Own Organic, Brunswick, Paramount, Vital Life, UPPROTEIN, and Vital Strength brand names. The company operates in in Australia, New Zealand, South Africa, China, South East Asia, and the Middle East. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Taren Point, Australia. Freedom Foods Group Limited is a subsidiary of Arrovest Pty Limited.
